meta.title: The Iran Deal Under Trump
meta.description: Michael Pregent, Trita Parsi, Gary Samore, and Suzanne Kianpour discuss the fate of the Iran nuclear deal under the Trump administration. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
